output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? Act Before Time Runs Out
output.meta_description: Is your landlord not returning your deposit? Discover your tenant rights and the fastest way to demand your security deposit back today.
content_outline: The Real Reason Your Landlord Won't Give You Your Deposit Back
Tenant Rights 101: What a Landlord Can and Cannot Deduct
How to Escalate When Your Security Deposit Is Not Returned
key_points: State deadlines: Most landlords must return deposits within 14-45 days or face statutory penalties
Illegal deductions: Normal wear and tear, routine cleaning, and vague damage charges are often unlawful
Documentation wins: Move-in/move-out photos and receipts dramatically increase recovery odds
Demand letters work: A formal security deposit dispute letter is the fastest way to force payment before small claims court
output.cta: Stop waiting. Generate a state-specific security deposit demand letter in under 5 minutes with DepositBack and make your landlord pay attention.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US renters dealing with landlords withholding security deposits, making unlawful deductions, or ignoring state return deadlines
